latest.title: Hedgehogs don’t hibernate like groundhogs
latest.script_key: groundhogs go comatose in their burrows hedgehogs just nap cold days away then wake up to snack that s why you see their little paws twitching in snow no true hibernation here did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Trees don’t just stand still in water
latest.script_key: trees don t just stand still in water that shimmer isn t decoration it s the roots swaying underwater that s why the reflection keeps changing shape i love this one makes the whole forest feel alive would you notice if they stopped moving

latest.title: Trees don't have holes like this for no reason
latest.script_key: this hole isn t random it s a doorway watch the roots crawl inside to drink deep because bark can t hold enough water that s why trees carve their own tunnels what would you store in a tree s basement
